commands.review_summary:
The PR changes OpenAI-compatible embedding request construction, memory embedding retry splitting, batch completion logging, and related tests to address self-hosted embedding stalls.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +29. Total +70 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: no. live reproduction was run in this read-only review. The linked user report has concrete logs and the source path is traceable, and the PR-introduced regressions are source-reproducible from the diff and current tests.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer repair plus real behavior proof; the compatibility policy and missing runtime evidence are not safe for autonomous cleanup on this external PR.

target.title: fix(embedding): restrict openai-compatible dimensions to api.openai.com to prevent connection resets on self-hosted servers
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes memory index stalling on "batch start" when using `openai-compatible` embedding provider with non-OpenAI servers (llama.cpp, Ollama, Alibaba, etc.).

## Root cause

The `openai-compatible` embedding provider unconditionally sent the `dimensions` parameter (derived from `outputDimensionality` config) to every embedding server. The `dimensions` parameter is an OpenAI-specific feature supported only by `api.openai.com`. Sending it to self-hosted or third-party servers causes connection resets that trigger the memory embedding retry+split cascade, stalling indexing.

## Changes

### 1. Restrict `dimensions` to api.openai.com only
`src/plugins/openai-compatible-embedding-provider.ts` — The `postEmbeddingRequest` function now checks whether the baseUrl hostname is `api.openai.com` before including the `dimensions` parameter.

### 2. Add max split depth guard
`extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager-embedding-policy.ts` — Added `EMBEDDING_SPLIT_MAX_DEPTH=4` to prevent exponential retry fan-out when connection errors affect all sub-batches.

### 3. Add "batch completed" debug logs
`extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager-embedding-ops.ts` — Added debug logs for parity with "batch start", improving observability.

## Verification

- 41 tests pass across 3 test files (policy, integration, provider)
- TypeScript type check passes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
